commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Discord `voice.mode`/`voice.realtime` configuration, realtime PCM bridging for talk-buffer and bidi modes, shared consult-policy helpers, docs/changelog updates, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review blockers by source and dependency inspection: the current head delays subscription, skips realtime recovery reset, bypasses bridge close on some teardown paths, and consumes a fresh speaker context per bidi consult call. I did not run a live Discord voice call.
